message.title: 👋 Welcome to JustTheBuilder Support!
message.body:
Welcome to the official support server for **JustTheBuilder** — the ultimate AI-powered Discord server builder!

Here you can get help, request features, report bugs, and showcase your awesome server builds.

**Quick Start:**
👉 Read our guidelines in <#rules>
👉 Check frequently asked questions in <#faq>
👉 Chat with fellow builders in <#general>

Thank you for inviting JustTheBuilder to your server! 🚀

message.title: 📜 Server Guidelines
message.body:
Welcome! Please follow these simple guidelines to keep our community helpful and friendly:

1. **Be Respectful:** Treat fellow builders and staff with kindness. No harassment, hate speech, or toxicity.
2. **No Spamming:** Avoid spamming messages, invites, or bot commands in public channels.
3. **Use the Right Channels:** Post bug reports in <#bug-reports>, support requests in <#create-ticket>, and general chatter in <#general>.
4. **No Direct Messages to Staff:** Keep support questions in open tickets so our team can help you efficiently.
5. **Follow Discord Terms of Service:** All standard Discord guidelines apply here.

Violation of these rules may lead to warning, mute, or ban by staff.

message.title: ❓ Frequently Asked Questions
message.body:
**Q: How do I invite the bot to my server?**
A: You can invite it directly from our bot profile on Discord, or ask for the invite link in <#general>.

**Q: What is the Basic Build Pack?**
A: The Basic Build Pack is a one-time purchase ($3.99) that grants you **one complete premium server build** (unlimited channels, roles, full AI customization, auto-written rules, and FAQs).

**Q: What is the Pro Builder subscription?**
A: The Pro Builder subscription ($6.99/mo) unlocks **unlimited server builds and rebuilds**, all **Fast-Track Presets**, a **built-in ticket system** on servers you build (categories + staff pings), and post-build embed edits via `/setup edit-message`.

**Q: I had the bot installed early, do I get anything?**
A: Yes! All 76 early adopter servers get **one completely free full AI server setup** as a loyalty gift. Just run `/setup run` in your server to claim it.

**Q: Can I edit the server structure after the bot builds it?**
A: Absolutely! The bot builds standard Discord channels and roles. You have full ownership and can rename, delete, or add anything you want.

message.title: 🎟️ Open a Support Ticket
message.body:
Need assistance with **billing**, **subscriptions**, or **custom configurations**?

Our team is here to help!

**Anyone** can open a ticket — choose a category below and staff will be notified.

🛡️ CLIENT SUPPORT.name: bug-reports
🛡️ CLIENT SUPPORT.topic: Report any bugs or errors you encounter while using the bot.
